mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notices (title, content, author_id, author_name, is_pinned, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{isPinned}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, author_id, author_name, is_pinned, created_at, updated_at FROM notices ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, title, content, author_id, author_name, is_pinned, created_at, updated_at FROM notices WHERE is_pinned = TRUE ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, title, content, author_id, author_name, is_pinned, created_at, updated_at FROM notices WHERE id = #{id}
